CREATE TABLE test_strings (str String, char String);
SELECT str, appendTrailingCharIfAbsent(str, char) AS modified_str FROM test_strings WHERE str IS NOT NULL;
INSERT INTO another_table VALUES ('Sample description'), ('No trailing char'), ('Trailing!', '!' ).
SELECT appendTrailingCharIfAbsent(description, '!') FROM another_table WHERE description != '';
CREATE TABLE complex_table (id Int32, text String, append_char String);
SELECT id, appendTrailingCharIfAbsent(text, append_char) AS new_text FROM complex_table;
SELECT id, appendTrailingCharIfAbsent(text, 'X') AS new_text FROM complex_table WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM complex_table WHERE id > 1);
SELECT appendTrailingCharIfAbsent(a.str, b.char) AS result FROM test_strings AS a JOIN another_table AS b ON a.char = '!' WHERE a.str != '';
